name: DagsHub
description: Unified MLOps platform for curating and annotating multimodal AI datasets, tracking experiments, and versioning models with Git/DVC-compatible workflows.

seo.title: DagsHub — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: DagsHub: Unified MLOps platform for curating and annotating multimodal AI datasets, tracking experiments, and versioning models with Git/DVC-compatible workflow

when_to_use: Versioning ML datasets and models with Git-compatible workflow
Tracking experiments alongside code in one platform
Collaborating on open-source ML projects with data versioning
Connecting DVC pipelines to a shared remote repository

cons: UI performance suffers on huge repos
review.verdict: The Git-native MLOps hub for teams that already think in pull requests.
review.best_for: ML teams who want reproducible data and model versioning via Git
review.not_for: Teams preferring lightweight experiment tracking without versioning overhead

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with no evidence of peak-lock
